MQ message consumer
prepolulate db data into redis

gather qps matrix
configure alert rule

Feature data cache
Redis Key1: prefix+daily sharding key+flag
Redis Value: Json string for all the configured data list
TTL: -1
Redis Key2: prefix+daily sharding key+appId+appType+region
Redis Value: a set of all the flag keys
TTL: -1

Bloom filter cache
BF key should include: prefix+daily sharding key+flag
TTL: -1

Sharding Key Strategy
1. daily key for full data caching
2. switch the latest sharding key globally and delete the old data
3. for both feature data and bloom filter cache
